narrative:
Green Twp township has 3,330 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
